creator: jakob@alvermark.net
text:
I got the same "Application Error" on -CURRENT when I updated from main-n244895-0a4f851074a to main-n244973-c02a28754bc.
I'm now on main-n245042-6f30ac9995f and still get this error.

I tried building it from ports, but I get the error described in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=253738
